mapper.select: /* userSettingsMapper.selectAccountDtl */ SELECT AI_SEQ AS aiSeq ,AI_SE AS aiSe ,AI_CODE AS aiCode ,AI_NM AS aiNm ,CARD_TYPE AS cardType ,SPEND_BGN_MT_SE AS spendBgnMtSe ,SPEND_BGN_DAY AS spendBgnDay ,SPEND_END_MT_SE AS spendEndMtSe ,SPEND_END_DAY AS spendEndDay ,AI_RM AS aiRm ,USE_YN AS useYn ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt FROM TB_ACCOUNT_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND AI_SEQ = #{aiSeq}
/* userSettingsMapper.selectAccountSeq */ SELECT IFNULL(MAX(AI_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_ACCOUNT_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId}

/* userSettingsMapper.selectSubCategoryList */ SELECT CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode ,CI_SEQ AS ciSeq ,CI_NM AS ciNm ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt FROM TB_CATEGORY_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND CATEGORY_CODE = #{categoryCode} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CI_SEQ

/* userSettingsMapper.selectCategoryDtl */ SELECT CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode ,CI_SEQ AS ciSeq ,CI_NM AS ciNm ,REG_ID AS regId ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt ,UPD_ID AS updId ,DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS updDt FROM TB_CATEGORY_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND CATEGORY_CODE = #{categoryCode} AND CI_SEQ = #{ciSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* userSettingsMapper.selectFiexedExpenseAccountList */ SELECT AI_SEQ AS aiSeq ,AI_SE AS aiSe ,AI_CODE AS aiCode ,AI_NM AS aiNm ,CARD_TYPE AS cardType ,SPEND_BGN_MT_SE AS spendBgnMtSe ,SPEND_BGN_DAY AS spendBgnDay ,SPEND_END_MT_SE AS spendEndMtSe ,SPEND_END_DAY AS spendEndDay ,USE_YN AS useYn ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt FROM TB_ACCOUNT_INFO A WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.REG_DT DESC

/* userSettingsMapper.selectFixedExpenseList */ SELECT AI_SEQ AS aiSeq ,FEI_SEQ AS feiSeq ,CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode ,CI_SEQ AS ciSeq ,INOUT_TYPE AS inoutType ,AMOUNT AS amount ,TRAN_DAY AS tranDay ,REMARK AS remark ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt FROM TB_FIXED_EXPENSE_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND AI_SEQ = #{aiSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY FEI_SEQ

/* userSettingsMapper.selectFixedExpenseDtl */ SELECT AI_SEQ AS aiSeq ,FEI_SEQ AS feiSeq ,CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode ,CI_SEQ AS ciSeq ,INOUT_TYPE AS inoutType ,AMOUNT AS amount ,TRAN_DAY AS tranDay ,REMARK AS remark ,REG_ID AS regId ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt ,UPD_ID AS updId ,DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS updDt FROM TB_FIXED_EXPENSE_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND AI_SEQ = #{aiSeq} AND FEI_SEQ = #{feiSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
/* userSettingsMapper.selectCategory */ SELECT CI_SEQ AS ciSeq ,CI_NM AS ciNm FROM TB_CATEGORY_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND CATEGORY_CODE = #{categoryCode} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CI_SEQ

/* userSettingsMapper.selectUseBookViewConfigList */ SELECT A.SEQ AS seq ,A.BC_NM AS bcNm ,A.REQUIRED_YN AS requiredYn ,B.BS_ORDER AS bsOrder FROM BOOK_CODE A LEFT JOIN TB_BOOK_VIEW_CONFIG B ON A.SEQ = B.SEQ AND B.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} WHERE B.BS_ORDER IS NULL ORDER BY A.SEQ

/* userSettingsMapper.selectUsedBookViewConfigList */ SELECT A.SEQ AS seq ,A.BC_NM AS bcNm ,A.REQUIRED_YN AS requiredYn ,B.BS_ORDER AS bsOrder FROM BOOK_CODE A LEFT JOIN TB_BOOK_VIEW_CONFIG B ON A.SEQ = B.SEQ AND B.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} WHERE B.BS_ORDER IS NOT NULL ORDER BY B.BS_ORDER
mapper.insert: /* userSettingsMapper.addSignUpBookViewConfig */ INSERT INTO TB_BOOK_VIEW_CONFIG SELECT #{userId}, SEQ, SEQ FROM BOOK_CODE
